transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to know if a physical therapist is covered under my plan. My name's Renee Castillo.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, Renee. Can you give me your date of birth and plan name so I can pull that up?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yeah, it's March 3rd, 1985, and I'm on the Bright Path Silver plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, thanks. Do you have a specific provider or clinic in mind, or just checking general PT coverage?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: There's a place called Oakview Physical Therapy on Grant Street. Someone recommended them.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check that... Yes, Oakview Physical Therapy is in-network with Bright Path Silver. You'd have a $30 copay per visit.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh perfect, that's way better than I expected.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You do need a referral first, though, since your plan requires one for specialist visits.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, I'll call my primary doctor tomorrow for that then.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sounds good. Anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Thanks so much for checking.
